member.name: M:SharedService.API.Controllers.v1.EnterpriseHierarchyController.GetTree(System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the full enterprise tree: companies, business units, facilities, and departments.

member.name: M:SharedService.API.Controllers.v1.FacilitiesController.GetHierarchyContext(System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Used by other microservices to validate FacilityId and load enterprise chain.
